title: InfoEd Global SPIN — Funding Database
content: InfoEd Global SPIN is the world's largest database of sponsored funding opportunities, tracking 40,000+ opportunities across thousands of governments, foundations, and commercial entities worldwide. It is searchable with powerful text and filter-based search tools, and includes the SMARTS automation tool for setting up daily or weekly alerts on new or modified opportunities. MSU faculty, students, and staff can access it at https://spin.infoedglobal.com/ to locate programs that fund all types of research.
